steps.title: Substitute x=5 into g(x) and set equal to 37
steps.content: We know that $g(5) = 37$. Substitute $x = 5$ into the function definition $g(x) = 6x + a$:$$g(5) = 6(5) + a = 37.$$Solve for a.

steps.title: Calculate and solve for a
steps.content:
$30 + a = 37$, so subtracting 30 from both sides we get $a = 7$.
That confirms C is correct.
